title: PhotochemicalOzoneCreationTRACIFactor
description: PhotochemicalOzoneCreationTRACIFactor: Single value indicator for Photochemical Ozone Creation as defined by the TRACI standard for a particular product or material.

Value.description: Value for this single factor indicator. Property has a quantity of type PhotochemicalOzoneCreationTRACIPerQuantity measured in [kg O₃ eq per unit].

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
